_doc: Fallback retrieval-query templates indexed by phenotype-fingerprint axis. Used by planner._axis_template_intents when the gap-driven hypothesis frontier is too thin to produce informative queries (Plan Item 6). Each axis has 2-3 PubMed-style query templates. Solo axes match a single dominant axis; pair axes match two co-dominant axes. Adding new axes is a data PR, not a code change.
